ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 将原始名称保存为别名

ast.name: error
ast.source: Editorialist: failed to flush plugin data on unload
ast.target: Editorialist: 卸载时未能刷新插件数据

ast.name: error
ast.source: Editorialist: failed to back up text to cut file
ast.target: Editorialist: 未能将文本备份到剪切文件

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 在此处粘贴格式化的修订笔记

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Ed — backup selection to cut file
ast.target: Ed — 将选区备份到剪切文件

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No matching scene text was found in the active notes.
ast.target: 在活动笔记中未找到匹配的场景文本。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cut folder override cleared — using the default location.
ast.target: 剪切文件夹覆盖已清除 — 使用默认位置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No saved revision batches were found.
ast.target: 未找到已保存的修订批次。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active Markdown note to import into.
ast.target: 没有活动的 Markdown 笔记可供导入。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Imported review block into the active note.
ast.target: 已将审阅块导入活动笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No imported review batch is active.
ast.target: 没有活动的已导入审阅批次。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No completed revision pass is available to clean.
ast.target: 没有已完成的修订轮次可供清理。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有活动的 Markdown 笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No imported Editorialist review blocks found in this note.
ast.target: 在此笔记中未找到已导入的 Editorialist 审阅块。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Review batch registry entry not found.
ast.target: 未找到审阅批次注册表条目。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No pending edits in this scene.
ast.target: 此场景中没有待处理的编辑。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This pending-edit item is no longer in the scene — skipping.
ast.target: 此待处理编辑项已不在场景中 — 跳过。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 所有待处理编辑已处理完毕。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active Markdown note to review.
ast.target: 没有活动的 Markdown 笔记可供审阅。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No eligible suggestions are ready to apply and review in this scene.
ast.target: 此场景中没有符合条件的建议可供应用和审阅。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The active note does not match the current review session.
ast.target: 活动笔记与当前审阅会话不匹配。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No eligible suggestions could be safely applied.
ast.target: 无法安全应用任何符合条件的建议。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select text in the editor, or choose a cut or condense suggestion, to back up to the cut file.
ast.target: 在编辑器中选择文本，或选择剪切或精简建议，以备份到剪切文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not write to the cut file. Check the cut folder path in settings.
ast.target: 无法写入剪切文件。请检查设置中的剪切文件夹路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not update contributor. The name may be blank or already in use.
ast.target: 无法更新贡献者。名称可能为空或已被使用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 合并前请先创建另一个贡献者。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active Markdown note to continue from.
ast.target: 没有活动的 Markdown 笔记可供继续。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not open the next note for review.
ast.target: 无法打开下一个笔记进行审阅。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Clipboard access is not available in this environment.
ast.target: 此环境中剪贴板访问不可用。

ast.name: aria-label
ast.source: Clean review block from this scene

ast.name: aria-label
ast.target: 打开 Radial Timeline 维基

ast.name: aria-label
ast.source: Install the Radial Timeline community plugin
ast.target: 安装 Radial Timeline 社区插件

ast.name: aria-label
ast.source: Open the Radial Timeline plugin page
ast.target: 打开 Radial Timeline 插件页面

ast.name: body
ast.source: Pull in contributor notes from a human reader or AI editor, then accept, reject, or rewrite each suggestion in turn.
ast.target: 从人工读者或 AI 编辑器引入贡献者笔记，然后依次接受、拒绝或重写每条建议。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Walk through free-form revision notes you've left across the active book, scene by scene.
ast.target: 逐场景浏览您在整个活动书籍中留下的自由形式修订笔记。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Star trusted reviewers, resolve aliases on imported batches, and track who shaped each draft.
ast.target: 为信任的审阅者加星，解析已导入批次的别名，并追踪谁塑造了每个草稿。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 找到格式化的修订笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose which imported revision pass to remove from saved Editorialist history.
ast.target: 选择要从已保存的 Editorialist 历史记录中移除的已导入修订轮次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This removes the saved decisions and stats for that batch. Review blocks still present in notes will be discovered again.
ast.target: 这将移除该批次的已保存决策和统计数据。笔记中仍存在的审阅块将被重新发现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This clears Editorialist’s saved batch history and decision stats. Review blocks still present in notes will be discovered again.
ast.target: 这将清除 Editorialist 的已保存批次历史记录和决策统计数据。笔记中仍存在的审阅块将被重新发现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This review batch appears to match an existing imported sweep. Open it, import again, or cancel.
ast.target: 此审阅批次似乎与现有的已导入扫描匹配。请打开它、重新导入或取消。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This removes the imported review blocks from your notes. After cleanup you will no longer be able to walk through this pass with "Review changes" — the audit data only lives inside those blocks.
ast.target: 这将从您的笔记中移除已导入的审阅块。清理后，您将无法再通过“审阅更改”来浏览此轮次——审计数据仅存在于这些块中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Editorialist reviews two kinds of revision work: imported review notes and PENDING EDITS notes across the active book.
ast.target: Editorialist 审阅两种修订工作：已导入的审阅笔记和整个活动书籍中的待处理编辑笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete all contributor profiles and saved contributor stats? Revision decisions stay in place, but the contributor directory will be cleared.
ast.target: 删除所有贡献者个人资料和已保存的贡献者统计数据？修订决策将保留，但贡献者目录将被清除。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Cancel and fix the SceneId values in the pasted text, then paste again.
ast.target: 取消并修复粘贴文本中的 SceneId 值，然后重新粘贴。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Try copying the AI's reply again — only the metadata header through the last operation block.
ast.target: 请尝试再次复制 AI 的回复——仅从元数据头到最后一个操作块。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Click 'Copy formatting instructions' below to see the expected shape, then run it through your AI again.
ast.target: 点击下方的“复制格式说明”查看预期格式，然后再次通过您的 AI 运行。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Open the scene you want reviewed, then click 'Copy formatting instructions' — the prompt includes your real scene ids and tells the AI not to invent them.
ast.target: 打开您想要审阅的场景，然后点击“复制格式说明”——提示中包含您真实的场景 ID，并告知 AI 不要虚构它们。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Review pending edits in active book
ast.target: 审阅活动书籍中的待处理编辑

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选中内容备份到剪裁文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Import formatted revision notes, continue in this note, or copy formatting instructions for your AI.
ast.target: 导入格式化的修订笔记，在此笔记中继续，或为您的AI复制格式说明。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 粘贴格式化的修订笔记

ast.name: text
ast.target: 在此处粘贴格式化的修订笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The declared SceneId points at a scene that does not contain the quoted text, but the text matches exactly one other scene. This usually means the AI reused a stale scene id from the chat thread.
ast.target: 声明的SceneId指向的场景不包含引用的文本，但该文本与另一个场景完全匹配。这通常意味着AI在聊天线程中复用了过时的场景ID。

ast.name: text
ast.source: How do you use this contributor?

ast.name: text
ast.source: Review revision and contributor details in settings.
ast.target: 在设置中审阅修订和贡献者详情。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Formatted revision notes found, but no valid entries were parsed.
ast.target: 找到格式化的修订笔记，但未解析出有效条目。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No suggestions match the current reviewer filter.
ast.target: 没有建议与当前审阅者筛选条件匹配。

ast.name: text
ast.source: See how each voice shapes your draft
ast.target: 了解每个声音如何塑造您的草稿

ast.name: text
ast.source: Preserve strong prose before you reduce
ast.target: 在精简前保留优秀的文笔

ast.name: text
ast.source: When a pass calls for cutting or condensing, you often want to keep the original wording — strong lines, lore, ideas you might reuse later. “Backup to cut file” copies the selected text into a per-scene cut file without changing any review decision. Configure where those cut files live below.
ast.target: 当一轮审阅需要剪裁或精简时，您通常希望保留原始措辞——精彩的句子、背景设定、日后可能重用的想法。“备份到剪裁文件”会将选中的文本复制到每个场景的剪裁文件中，而不更改任何审阅决定。请在下方配置这些剪裁文件的存放位置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Editorialist works with any notes, but it becomes even more useful when combined with the visual architecture of the Radial Timeline plugin for Obsidian and its scene and book project organization.
ast.target: Editorialist 可与任何笔记配合使用，但当它与 Obsidian 的径向时间线插件及其场景和书籍项目的可视化架构相结合时，会变得更加实用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Find it in Community Plugins -> search "Radial Timeline"
ast.target: 在社区插件中查找 -> 搜索“Radial Timeline”

ast.name: text
ast.target: 基于径向时间线的追踪

ast.name: text
ast.source: Radial Timeline gives Editorialist stable scene IDs in the active book, so revision history stays attached to the right scene even when titles change or scenes are reordered.
ast.target: 径向时间线为 Editorialist 在活动书籍中提供稳定的场景 ID，因此即使标题更改或场景重新排序，修订历史记录也会附加到正确的场景上。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This vault is currently falling back to note paths. For accurate rename-safe tracking outside Radial Timeline, inject stable note IDs into tracked notes.
ast.target: 此保险库当前回退到笔记路径。为了在径向时间线之外进行准确的重命名安全追踪，请将稳定的笔记 ID 注入到被追踪的笔记中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: See what remains in the current revision pass and whether there is an active sweep in progress.
ast.target: 查看当前修订过程中剩余的内容以及是否有正在进行的活动扫描。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No active Radial Timeline book context is available right now, so Editorialist is tracking review activity by note. If RT book metadata becomes available later, this inventory will tighten back to scene-aware language automatically.
ast.target: 当前没有可用的活动径向时间线书籍上下文，因此 Editorialist 正在按笔记追踪审阅活动。如果稍后 RT 书籍元数据可用，此清单将自动收紧回场景感知语言。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create a backup file with reviewer profiles, alternate names, starred reviewers, revision history, and scene progress.
ast.target: 创建一个包含审阅者资料、备用名称、标星审阅者、修订历史和场景进度的备份文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can keep this backup file and restore the data later if needed.
ast.target: 您可以保留此备份文件，并在需要时稍后恢复数据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Delete contributor profiles and clear saved contributor stats when you need to unwind duplicate or throwaway contributor data.
ast.target: 当您需要撤销重复或一次性贡献者数据时，删除贡献者资料并清除已保存的贡献者统计信息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This clears the contributor directory and saved contributor stats, but leaves revision decisions and scene history in place.
ast.target: 这会清除贡献者目录和已保存的贡献者统计信息，但会保留修订决策和场景历史记录。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 重置已保存的修订历史

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use this if a pass was imported twice or you need to unwind saved stats. Imported review blocks still inside notes will be discovered again on the next sync.
ast.target: 如果某次处理被导入了两次，或者您需要撤销已保存的统计信息，请使用此选项。笔记中已导入的审阅块将在下次同步时被重新发现。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Resetting history clears Editorialist’s saved decisions and batch tracking, not the review blocks currently written into notes.
ast.target: 重置历史记录会清除 Editorialist 的已保存决策和批处理追踪，但不会清除当前写入笔记中的审阅块。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Start pending-edits review in active book
ast.target: 在活动书籍中开始待编辑审阅

ast.name: title
ast.source: This scene also has pending edits (free-form revision notes).
ast.target: 此场景也有待处理的编辑（自由形式的修订笔记）。

ast.name: title
ast.target: 检测到可能存在的现有审阅批次

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Review the pending edits on this scene
ast.target: 审阅此场景上的待编辑内容

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Start a pending-edits review across the active book
ast.target: 在活动书籍中开始待编辑审阅
